goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Axe proves a product defect. Five exposed and four conditional/placeholder-only action controls lack stable accessible names; exactly nine product-specific aria-label additions are required.

worker_package.objective: Add exactly nine product-specific accessible names to Pantry action controls, then run full static/build and independent browser/persistence gates.
verify: Require PantryManager source/mirror pre-hash 3380114A9E235B9080F053C4B92C36FB198A5BA4EF91A660D9B0BB7A09A9CEF2 and unchanged management-spec hash 46EF395A289F2A518E4875869350F94BA4F6E302BA272F093D4BBC0BBB4F3027.
Add exactly nine product-specific aria-labels: Correct unit/approximate/reason; Split unit/location; Discard reason; Donation reason; Restore unit/approximate.
Preserve all element types/names/placeholders/defaults/payloads/actions/layout and existing labels; run scoped format/lint and mirror hash equality.
Run format:check, lint, typecheck, test, and isolated mirror build.
Run fresh management with all behavior, zero axe at three scans, three overflow/screenshots, no errors.
Release port, fresh integrated 400/350/50 flow, zero axe at two scans, five screenshots, no errors.
Inspect persistence read-only, disposable migrate/dbcheck, final port/diff/status.
stop_if: Pre-hashes differ or any change beyond nine aria-label attributes is required.
Any name is generic/duplicated/lacks product identity or existing behavior changes.
Static/build/axe/workflow fails twice or axe weakening is proposed.

evidence: Five critical axe nodes were exposed in Correct/Split.
Exhaustive audit adds Discard, Donate, and conditional Restore controls for nine total.
All management behaviors passed before axe.

parallel_safety.rationale: One product component/mirror/DB/artifact/port lifecycle must be serial.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
